title: Status Crops
description: Farm Status Effect Crops with Genetics™
body:
# Farm Status Effect Crops with Genetics™

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/umollu/status-crops/master/screenshot.png)

### Each Status Fruit has a Positive and Negative Status Effect. 
But not every crop is the same and you can change it!
 
### Get Status Seeds from grass and ferns. There are 5 types of fruits
- Speed Status Fruit
- Mining Status Fruit
- Strength Status Fruit
- Jump Status Fruit
- Night Vision Status Fruit

 
### Using the power of Genetics, cross breed crops to improve stats and balance of the crops. Try to max all the stats
- Level: Max. 5
- Duration: Max. 5
- Balance: Max. 10

 
## Config: Change drop chances

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/umollu/status-crops/master/config.png)
